case_title: ANGELICA FARBER VS. MICHAEL J WESTON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARBER, ANGELICA AS TO DEFENDANT WESTON, MICHAEL J DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-04-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-18-2003

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-12-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UPON DEFENDANTS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARBER, ANGELICA
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UPON DEFENDANTS.
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-06-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 225 SET FOR JAN-06-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOV-12-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
